text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We're in my office, and Ines Fujin has been
talking to someone on the phone for a while now.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Right. Yes... but Mom, it's what Cassie and Polly
want...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, just leave it to me... Don't worry, I'll be
fine! Talk to you soon!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Now then, Trainer! I need a big favor!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's almost time for Ines Fujin's race to begin. In
the waiting room, a pair of Umamusume twins are
perched happily on chairs.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Now listen up, you two! Make sure you do what
my trainer tells you to while I'm not here!

text_block_list.name: Ines's Little Sisters
text_block_list.text: We will!
choice_data_list: That's what I like to hear!
That's what I like to hear!

text_block_list.name: Ines's Little Sisters
text_block_list.text: Yaaay!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ines Fujin's little sisters have come to watch her
debut race. That big favor she wanted was for me
to look after them.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Thanks for bringing them both here.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Unfortunately, my race overlaps with our mom's
hospital visit, but they both kept pleading for the
chance to come along and watch me.
choice_data_list: I've got this. You just focus on the race!
I've got this. You just focus on the race!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Haha, okay. I'm counting on you!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna head to the paddock. Wish me luck!

text_block_list.name: Little Sister A
text_block_list.text:
W-wait a sec! The two of us have something we
want to show you, sis!
Ready, set...

text_block_list.name: Little Sister A
text_block_list.text: Spin, spin, and pom-poms!

text_block_list.name: Little Sister B
text_block_list.text: Pom-pom! One, two...

text_block_list.name: Ines's Little Sisters
text_block_list.text:
"Do your best, Big Sis!"
Hehe, did you like our cheer dance?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Haha! That was fantastic! Thanks a bunch, you
two!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
You've given your big sis a huge energy boost! I'm
gonna have to reward you by finishing in first
place!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After saying goodbye to Ines Fujin, I take the
twins by their hands and lead them over to the
spectator seating.

text_block_list.name: Little Sister A
text_block_list.text:
Wow! So this is Nakayama Racecourse... It looks
different on TV, huh?

text_block_list.name: Little Sister B
text_block_list.text: There's not that many people, either.
choice_data_list: That's because this is a debut race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I imagine they're more accustomed to seeing the
Nakayama Racecourse filled to the rafters during
the Arima Kinen and Satsuki Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The only people in the stands right now are the
race organizers and avid fans. It probably feels
different from that big, festival-like vibe.

text_block_list.name: Little Sister A
text_block_list.text: Huh, I see.
choice_data_list: Were you expecting it to be more exciting?

text_block_list.name: Little Sister A
text_block_list.text:
No, this is still really great! We get to watch Big
Sis race!

text_block_list.name: Little Sister B
text_block_list.text:
She loves running a whole bunch! And I love
seeing her have fun!

text_block_list.name: Ines's Little Sisters
text_block_list.text: Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Ines's Little Sisters
text_block_list.text:
Right! So we're gonna cheer extra loud to help her
win!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Inhale... Exhale...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Gotta calm these nerves... I can do this! I just have to
remember what my trainer taught me!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
It figures there aren't many spectators at my first
race. I just need to produce results—then my
popularity will soar!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: (I can hear so many different voices.)

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
(Voices from the Umamusume I'm competing
against, and those from the spectators waiting
just beyond the paddock.)

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Inhale... exhale...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
(Is that an announcement? They must be using a
high quality speaker system. I can hear the sounds
of the paddock from here.)

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
(I wonder if my number has already appeared on
the jumbotron.)

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Inhale...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: This is it—the real deal.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Ladies and gentlemen, please join us as we watch
these courageous Umamusume take the first steps
on their racing journeys!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Twinkle Series, here I come!
